name: RWGBench: Evaluating Scholarly Positioning in Related Work Generation
summary: arXiv:2606.24894v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models have shown strong fluency in scientific writing, yet the evaluation of related work generation (RWG) remains limited....
description: arXiv:2606.24894v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models have shown strong fluency in scientific writing, yet the evaluation of related work generation (RWG) remains limited. Existing RWG evaluations largely inherit summarization-oriented metrics, using lexical or semantic similarity to reference sections as proxies for quality. However, related work writing is fundamenta...
author: Anzhe Xie, Weihang Su, Jiaxin Mao, Yiqun Liu, Min Zhang, Shaoping Ma, Qingyao Ai
